title: aspidium proliferum
intro: Aspidium proliferum, also known as the Asplenium proliferum or the spleenwort, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Aspleniaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Aspidium proliferum include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues, among others. Herbal preparations of Aspidium proliferum include teas, infusions, and poultices, which can be used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
